AICARDMOD-HOLY_STRIKE_CARD.title: Holy Strike
AICARDMOD-PIOUS_DEFEND_CARD.title: Pious Defend
AICARDMOD-PIOUS_DEFEND_CARD.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
If Piety >= 2, gain {BonusBlock:diff()} more Block.
AICARDMOD-PIOUS_DEFEND_CARD.upgraded_des:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
If Piety >= 2, gain {BonusBlock:diff()} more Block.
AICARDMOD-ORACLE_TABLET_RELIC.title: Oracle Tablet
AICARDMOD-ORACLE_TABLET_RELIC.descriptio: When using Oracle at 0 Piety, the oracle responds as DISPLEASED instead of ANGERED.
AICARDMOD-PRAY_CARD.title: Prayer
AICARDMOD-DEVOTION_CARD.title: Devotion
AICARDMOD-DEVOTION_CARD.description: Gain 1 Piety at the start of each turn.
AICARDMOD-DEVOTION_CARD.upgraded_descrip: Gain 2 Piety at the start of each turn.
AICARDMOD-AI_CARD.title: AI Oracle
AICARDMOD-AI_CARD.description: Name your desire. The AI grants exactly what you ask - if it is too powerful, a price must be paid.
AICARDMOD-AI_CARD.upgraded_description: Name your desire. The AI grants exactly what you ask - if it is too powerful, a price must be paid.
AICARDMOD-UI_DIALOG.title: Oracle  -  Name Your Desire
AICARDMOD-UI_DIALOG.instructions:
What effect do you want? (e.g. "80 block", "draw 3 cards", "2 strength")
If the request is too powerful, the AI will add a penalty to balance it.
AICARDMOD-SACRED_FLAME_CARD.title: Sacred Flame
AICARDMOD-SACRED_FLAME_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If Piety >= 3, deal {BonusDamage:diff()} more damage.
AICARDMOD-SACRED_FLAME_CARD.upgraded_des: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If Piety >= 3, deal {BonusDamage:diff()} more damage.
AICARDMOD-JUDGMENT_CARD.title: Judgment
AICARDMOD-JUDGMENT_CARD.description: Apply {VulnAmount:diff()} Vulnerable to target. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
AICARDMOD-JUDGMENT_CARD.upgraded_descrip: Apply {VulnAmount:diff()} Vulnerable to target. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.

AICARDMOD-DIVINE_PUNISHMENT_CARD.upgrade: Lose 3 Piety. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and {BonusDamage:diff()} bonus damage.
AICARDMOD-DIVINE_STRIKE_CARD.title: Divine Strike
AICARDMOD-DIVINE_STRIKE_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Hits:diff()} times. Gain 1 Piety per hit.
AICARDMOD-DIVINE_STRIKE_CARD.upgraded_de: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Hits:diff()} times. Gain 1 Piety per hit.

AICARDMOD-CONDEMN_CARD.title: Condemn

AICARDMOD-CONDEMN_CARD.upgraded_descript: Apply {WeakAmount:diff()} Weak and {VulnAmount:diff()} Vulnerable to target.
AICARDMOD-PURIFICATION_CARD.title: Purification
AICARDMOD-PURIFICATION_CARD.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold]
Gain 4 Piety. Add a Smite to your hand.
AICARDMOD-PURIFICATION_CARD.upgraded_des:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold]
Gain 6 Piety. Add a Smite to your hand.
AICARDMOD-ORACLE_INSIGHT_CARD.title: Oracle's Insight
AICARDMOD-ORACLE_INSIGHT_CARD.descriptio:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold]
Draw 3 cards. Gain 2 Piety. Add an Offering Chant to your hand.
AICARDMOD-ORACLE_INSIGHT_CARD.upgraded_d:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold]
Draw 4 cards. Gain 3 Piety. Add an Offering Chant to your hand.
AICARDMOD-DIVINE_LIGHT_CARD.title: Divine Light
AICARDMOD-DIVINE_LIGHT_CARD.description: At the start of each turn, gain 3 Block.
AICARDMOD-DIVINE_LIGHT_CARD.upgraded_des: At the start of each turn, gain 5 Block.
AICARDMOD-PROPHET_EYE_CARD.title: Prophet's Eye
AICARDMOD-PROPHET_EYE_CARD.description: At the start of each turn, if Piety >= 6, add a Prayer to your hand.
AICARDMOD-PROPHET_EYE_CARD.upgraded_desc: At the start of each turn, if Piety >= 4, add a Prayer to your hand.

AICARDMOD-REVELATION_VOLLEY_CARD.upgrade: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage 1 time. For every {PietyPerExtraHit:diff()} Piety, deal it 1 additional time (max {MaxHits:diff()} hits).
